summary: High‑quality matrix recording of a tight, compact set highlighted by He Was a Friend, Doin’ That Rag, Me & My Uncle and a smoking Cryptical > Other 1 > Cryptical sequence.
review: The show is praised for its concise, well‑flowing performance with standout versions of “He Was a Friend of Mine,” “Doin' That Rag,” and the classic “Me & My Uncle.” Reviewers also note an especially tight Cryptical > Other 1 > Cryptical (Cryptical Reprise) run and Jerry Garcia’s picking‑up‑the‑pace guitar work. The matrix source provides good, clear sound that lets these moments shine.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are overwhelmingly positive about both the performance and the audio; the show is described as a tight set with multiple standout songs, and the recording quality is noted as good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers comment on “Good sound” and a clean capture of the compact set; no major drop‑outs or muddiness reported.

standout_songs: He Was a Friend of Mine
show_quality.setlist_flow: A concise, well‑sequenced set that closes strongly with “Me & My Uncle”; the Cryptical/Other 1 transition is highlighted as particularly tight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers note Jerry’s playing picking up speed and delivering beautifully developed guitar solos.
